homepage.heroSubline: Precision craftsmanship meets Arizona grit. Delivering lasting quality for your home or business.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Mesa, One Project at a Time
aboutText: Triple Digit Wood Design started with a simple mission: to bring unparalleled carpentry to Mesa and the surrounding communities. We're not just builders; we're problem-solvers who understand the unique challenges of Arizona construction.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous planning, quality materials, and unwavering dedication to the client's vision. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of care and attention to detail. No shortcuts, just solid craftsmanship.

We're deeply invested in the Mesa community. From supporting local suppliers to volunteering our skills, we believe in giving back to the people who have supported us. Our reputation is built on trust, integrity, and a commitment to excellence.

valueProps.title: Arizona Tough
valueProps.description: Built to withstand the harsh Arizona climate, using materials and techniques that last.

valueProps.title: Craftsmanship Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work. If you're not satisfied, we'll make it right – no questions asked.

valueProps.title: Clear Communication
valueProps.description: We keep you informed every step of the way, from initial consultation to final walkthrough.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Mesa's building codes, common construction styles, and community needs.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote for your carpentry project today. Call us now!

services.name: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Elevate your space with handcrafted cabinets tailored to your exact needs.
services.description:
Tired of cookie-cutter cabinets that don't fit your style or space? Triple Digit Wood Design specializes in crafting custom cabinetry solutions that maximize functionality and enhance the beauty of your home. From kitchen renovations to built-in bookshelves, we work closely with you to design and build cabinets that perfectly reflect your vision.

We understand the unique challenges of Arizona homes, including the intense sun and dry climate. That's why we use only the highest-quality materials and construction techniques to ensure your cabinets withstand the test of time. Our finishes are specifically chosen to resist fading, cracking, and warping, keeping your cabinets looking beautiful for years to come.

Whether you're looking for sleek modern designs or classic, rustic styles, we have the expertise to bring your ideas to life. We handle every aspect of the project, from initial design and fabrication to professional installation, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience. Let us transform your space with custom cabinetry that's built to last.
process: Step 1: Consultation - Discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget.
Step 2: Design - Develop detailed plans and 3D renderings of your custom cabinets.
Step 3: Fabrication - Handcraft your cabinets using premium materials and expert techniques.
Step 4: Installation - Professionally install your cabinets with precision and care.
benefits: Enhance the aesthetic appeal of your home
Personalized design tailored to your specific needs

faq.question: What types of wood do you use for custom cabinetry?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of wood options, including maple, oak, cherry, and walnut. We can also source specialty woods upon request. All our wood is carefully selected for its quality and durability.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete a custom cabinetry project?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, we typically complete most custom cabinetry projects within 4-8 weeks from initial consultation to final installation.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for custom cabinetry?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your dream cabinetry a reality. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

services.name: Deck & Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom-designed deck or patio.
services.description:
Arizona living is all about enjoying the outdoors. Triple Digit Wood Design can help you create the perfect outdoor oasis with a custom-designed deck or patio. We understand the unique challenges of building in the desert climate, from intense sun to monsoon season.

We use durable, weather-resistant materials that can withstand the harsh Arizona elements. Our decks and patios are built to last, providing you with years of enjoyment. We offer a variety of decking options, including composite decking, which is low-maintenance and resistant to fading, staining, and warping.

Whether you're looking for a simple patio for grilling or a multi-level deck with built-in seating and a pergola, we can bring your vision to life. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and permitting to construction and finishing. Let us help you create the perfect outdoor space for relaxing, entertaining, and enjoying the Arizona sunshine.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - Evaluate your property and discuss your design ideas.
Step 2: Design & Permitting - Create detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
Step 3: Construction - Build your deck or patio using high-quality materials and expert techniques.
Step 4: Finishing - Add finishing touches, such as railings, stairs, and lighting.
benefits: Create a space for relaxing and entertaining
Enhance the beauty of your backyard

faq.question: What materials do you use for deck and patio construction?
faq.answer: We use a variety of materials, including wood, composite decking, and concrete pavers. We can help you choose the best materials for your specific needs and budget.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: In most cases, yes, you will need a permit to build a deck or patio. We can handle the permitting process for you.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a deck or patio?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, most deck and patio projects can be completed within 2-4 weeks.

services.name: Pergolas & Shade Structures
services.shortDescription: Beat the Arizona heat with a custom pergola or shade structure.
services.description:
The Arizona sun can be brutal. Triple Digit Wood Design offers custom-built pergolas and shade structures to provide relief from the heat and add architectural interest to your outdoor space. We understand the importance of creating comfortable outdoor living areas that can be enjoyed year-round.

We use durable, weather-resistant materials that can withstand the intense sun and monsoon rains. Our pergolas and shade structures are designed to provide optimal shade and ventilation, keeping you cool and comfortable even on the hottest days. We offer a variety of design options, from simple and elegant to elaborate and ornate.

Whether you're looking for a pergola to cover your patio or a shade structure to protect your pool, we can bring your vision to life. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and permitting to construction and finishing. Let us help you create a cool and comfortable outdoor oasis that you can enjoy all year long.
process: Step 1: Consultation - Discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget.
Step 2: Design & Permitting - Create detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
Step 3: Construction - Build your pergola or shade structure using high-quality materials and expert techniques.
Step 4: Finishing - Add finishing touches, such as staining, painting, and decorative elements.
benefits: Provide shade and protection from the sun
Enhance the beauty of your outdoor space
Create a comfortable outdoor living area

faq.question: What materials do you use for pergolas and shade structures?
faq.answer: We use a variety of materials, including wood, metal, and fabric. We can help you choose the best materials for your specific needs and budget.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a pergola or shade structure?
faq.answer: In most cases, yes, you will need a permit to build a pergola or shade structure. We can handle the permitting process for you.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a pergola or shade structure?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, most pergola and shade structure projects can be completed within 1-3 weeks.

services.name: Custom Furniture
services.shortDescription: Unique, handcrafted furniture designed to fit your style and space.
services.description:
Don't settle for mass-produced furniture that lacks character and doesn't quite fit your space. Triple Digit Wood Design creates custom furniture pieces that are as unique as you are. We work closely with you to design and build furniture that perfectly reflects your style and meets your specific needs.

From dining tables and chairs to coffee tables and bookshelves, we can create any piece of furniture you can imagine. We use only the finest materials and construction techniques to ensure your furniture is not only beautiful but also durable and long-lasting.

We understand that furniture is an investment, which is why we take the time to create pieces that you'll cherish for years to come. Let us help you create a home that is truly your own with custom-designed furniture that reflects your personality and style.
process: Step 1: Consultation - Discuss your needs, style preferences, and budget.
Step 2: Design - Develop detailed plans and 3D renderings of your custom furniture.
Step 3: Fabrication - Handcraft your furniture using premium materials and expert techniques.
Step 4: Finishing - Apply a protective finish to enhance the beauty and durability of your furniture.

faq.question: What types of wood do you use for custom furniture?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of wood options, including maple, oak, cherry, and walnut. We can also source specialty woods upon request. All our wood is carefully selected for its quality and durability.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete a custom furniture project?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, we typically complete most custom furniture projects within 2-6 weeks from initial consultation to final delivery.

faq.question: Do you offer delivery services for custom furniture?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer delivery services throughout the Mesa area. We can also arrange for shipping to other locations.

services.name: Door & Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with energy-efficient doors and windows.
services.description:
Old, drafty doors and windows can significantly impact your home's energy efficiency and comfort. Triple Digit Wood Design offers professional door and window installation services to help you upgrade your home and save money on your energy bills. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure optimal performance and longevity.

We offer a wide selection of energy-efficient doors and windows from leading manufacturers. Our experienced installers will ensure that your new doors and windows are installed correctly, preventing drafts and leaks. We also offer repair services for existing doors and windows.

Whether you're looking to replace a single door or window or upgrade all the doors and windows in your home, we can help. We'll work with you to choose the best products for your needs and budget. Let us help you improve your home's energy efficiency and comfort with professional door and window installation services.
process: Step 1: Consultation - Assess your existing doors and windows and discuss your needs.
Step 2: Product Selection - Choose the best doors and windows for your home and budget.
Step 3: Installation - Professionally install your new doors and windows with precision and care.
Step 4: Finishing - Add finishing touches, such as trim and caulking.

faq.question: What types of doors and windows do you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide variety of doors and windows, including entry doors, patio doors, sliding glass doors, single-hung windows, double-hung windows, casement windows, and awning windows.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a door or window?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, most door and window installations can be completed within 1-2 days.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your door and window installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a warranty on our door and window installations. Contact us for details.

services.name: Trim & Molding Installation
services.shortDescription: Add elegance and detail to your home with custom trim and molding.
services.description:
Trim and molding can add a touch of elegance and sophistication to any room. Triple Digit Wood Design offers professional trim and molding installation services to help you enhance the beauty of your home. We understand the importance of precise cuts and seamless joints to create a finished look that you'll love.

We offer a wide variety of trim and molding options, including baseboards, crown molding, chair rails, and door and window casings. Our experienced installers will ensure that your trim and molding is installed correctly, creating a polished and professional look.

Whether you're looking to add trim and molding to a single room or your entire home, we can help. We'll work with you to choose the best styles and materials for your needs and budget. Let us help you transform your home with custom trim and molding installation services.
process: Step 1: Consultation - Discuss your style preferences and budget.
Step 2: Product Selection - Choose the best trim and molding styles and materials for your home.
Step 3: Installation - Professionally install your trim and molding with precision and care.
Step 4: Finishing - Add finishing touches, such as caulking and painting.
benefits: Creates a polished and professional look

faq.question: What types of trim and molding do you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide variety of trim and molding, including baseboards, crown molding, chair rails, door and window casings, and wainscoting.

faq.question: How long does it take to install trim and molding?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, most trim and molding installations can be completed within 1-3 days.

faq.question: Do you offer painting services for trim and molding?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer painting services for trim and molding. We can match any paint color to seamlessly integrate your new trim and molding with your existing decor.

services.name: Home Renovations & Remodels
services.shortDescription: Transform your living space with expert renovation and remodeling services.
services.description:
Ready to breathe new life into your home? Triple Digit Wood Design provides comprehensive home renovation and remodeling services tailored to your vision and budget. We understand the unique challenges of working on existing homes in the Mesa area, from outdated layouts to aging infrastructure.

Whether you're looking to remodel your kitchen, bathroom, or entire home, we have the expertise to bring your ideas to life. We handle all aspects of the project, from initial design and permitting to demolition, construction, and finishing. Our team of skilled craftsmen is dedicated to delivering exceptional quality and attention to detail.

We work closely with you throughout the entire process, ensuring that your vision is realized and that the project is completed on time and within budget. Let us help you transform your house into the home of your dreams with our expert renovation and remodeling services.
process: Step 1: Consultation - Discuss your goals, budget, and timeline.
Step 2: Design & Planning - Develop detailed plans and obtain necessary permits.
Step 3: Demolition - Safely remove existing structures and materials.
Step 4: Construction - Build your new space with precision and care.
Step 5: Finishing - Add finishing touches, such as painting, flooring, and fixtures.

faq.question: What types of home renovations and remodels do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of home renovation and remodeling services, including kitchen remodels, bathroom remodels, basement finishing, room additions, and whole-house renovations.

faq.question: How long does a home renovation or remodel take?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, most home renovations and remodels can be completed within 4-12 weeks.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for home renovations and remodels?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to help make your dream renovation a reality. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

serviceAreas.content:
Triple Digit Wood Design is proud to offer expert carpentry services to homeowners and businesses in Phoenix, Arizona. From custom cabinetry and shelving to intricate trim work and structural repairs, we bring unparalleled craftsmanship to every project. We understand the unique characteristics of Phoenix homes, many of which feature block construction dating back to the 1960s and 70s, and we have the experience to work with these structures effectively.

Phoenix summers can be brutal, with temperatures frequently exceeding 110°F. We take extra precautions to ensure our work is durable and weather-resistant, using high-quality materials and proven techniques to withstand the harsh desert climate. Whether you're looking to update your kitchen, add custom storage solutions, or repair weather-damaged wood, Triple Digit Wood Design is your trusted partner in Phoenix.
serviceAreas.localContext: Phoenix is a sprawling desert city with a mix of architectural styles, including many mid-century modern homes and a significant number of properties built with block construction.

serviceAreas.content:
Triple Digit Wood Design provides high-end carpentry services to the discerning residents of Scottsdale, Arizona. Known for its luxury Southwestern estates and upscale homes, Scottsdale demands a level of craftsmanship that exceeds expectations. We specialize in creating custom woodwork that complements the unique architectural styles found throughout the city.

We understand the importance of quality and attention to detail when working in Scottsdale. From custom wine cellars and entertainment centers to outdoor living spaces and intricate trim work, we use only the finest materials and employ meticulous techniques to achieve stunning results. Scottsdale's extreme summer heat requires durable, weather-resistant carpentry, and we take every precaution to ensure our work stands the test of time.
serviceAreas.localContext: Scottsdale is known for its upscale homes, luxury resorts, and distinctive Southwestern architecture.

serviceAreas.content:
Triple Digit Wood Design is pleased to offer its carpentry expertise to the growing community of Chandler, Arizona. Known for its well-planned developments and family-friendly atmosphere, Chandler presents a unique blend of modern living and traditional values. We provide a wide range of carpentry services tailored to the needs of Chandler homeowners.

Many homes in Chandler were built in the 1990s and 2000s, featuring contemporary designs and functional layouts. We excel at creating custom storage solutions, updating kitchens and bathrooms, and enhancing outdoor living spaces to complement these modern homes. We are committed to providing Chandler residents with high-quality carpentry that enhances the beauty and value of their homes.
serviceAreas.localContext: Chandler is a large suburb of Phoenix characterized by planned communities and a thriving tech industry.

serviceAreas.content:

We provide a comprehensive range of carpentry services to meet the needs of Gilbert homeowners.

With a large percentage of homes built in the 2000s and 2010s, Gilbert boasts modern architectural styles and open floor plans. We specialize in creating custom woodwork that complements these contemporary designs, from custom cabinetry and shelving to intricate trim work and outdoor living spaces. We are committed to providing Gilbert residents with exceptional carpentry services that enhance the beauty and functionality of their homes.
serviceAreas.localContext: Gilbert is a rapidly growing town with a large number of newer homes built in the last two decades.

serviceAreas.content:

We also cater to the needs of homeowners looking to update their properties with custom cabinetry, trim work, or outdoor living spaces. Triple Digit Wood Design is your trusted partner for all your carpentry needs in Tempe.
serviceAreas.localContext: Tempe is a lively city known for its proximity to Arizona State University and its diverse population.

serviceAreas.content:

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Triple Digit Wood Design built the most amazing cabinets for our kitchen remodel! They listened to exactly what we wanted and the quality is outstanding. The installers were professional and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: We hired Triple Digit to build a deck in our backyard and are very happy with the result. The crew was professional, the work was done on time, and the deck looks great. There was a minor issue with the railing, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Would use them again.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: The pergola they installed over our patio has completely transformed our backyard. We can now enjoy the outdoors even during the hottest days. The craftsmanship is excellent, and the pergola is very sturdy. Thank you, Triple Digit!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: I commissioned a custom dining table from Triple Digit Wood Design, and it's absolutely stunning. The wood is beautiful, the finish is perfect, and the table is incredibly solid. It's a true work of art!

reviews.name: Karen M.
reviews.text: We had Triple Digit replace our front door, and the process was smooth and easy. The installer was on time, professional, and did a great job. The new door looks fantastic and has improved our home's curb appeal.

reviews.name: Tom H.
reviews.text: Triple Digit installed crown molding throughout our living room and dining room, and it looks amazing. The craftsmanship is impeccable, and the new trim has completely transformed the look of our home. Highly recommend their services!
